****

Dear Friend,

I need your help. Our final fundraising day of the month is here, and we are now so close to reaching our fundraising goal for this month. Unfortunately, though, we are not there yet.

**The Democrats have pledged millions of dollars to take back this seat that we narrowly won last year.** With only a 5-seat lead in the House of Representatives, I know that winning back the House is attainable. But, Democrats are committed to spending as much as they can from their warchest to make sure conservative voices are silenced in Congress.

That's why it's so important for us to hit this goal and keep up with the Democrats. [**Can I count on your support with an emergency end-of-month donation of $25 or whatever you can send in?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Xoelzg2lsiF_A75e6zb1bX75BHakf1UHLNuTFKSuhvPrBGWJfPbfx5WIeejUuoroO1CnGiw9cFT4j4Sh5_chsIlwXjp8pK8ETbypGZ68jdeAQztgXFJRZPzb0HR-b4N89GR4JV5OFjY3R2O0a_u20nF6xMhkDSBNAAaWzTjsDFoX3OeN5UOVYstR-OfxhBcVvyOBgoFbmxSgD0alhJr-MG8oGpMR4_u17ldwd7bYaMUEhLEARXoIO_ZEEVsq4Jbcf4sNUzWJ9JlZkD8BH9MIo2ogQ5n0FBPE7kuesWgdbcmGbJIhISVBbcAO2T3D0z2EpnsrZtbIj2pmy5Gr3kR_G6ewsK-ZcxF6CGo1w91rL_RVJ9lo-y6zBh7h-JL0qBrFT67azucGbSrmLICMtPy8ZpT8295lhTrarxHrUPsbxT5e07rh9yh1mbZKZrBGQ64FoXcgF4AmVyw=&c=9w7eFZACzREU43fgf7nMmXbVENMLPLKKRD5ssxKWxO4ArbiQuAx96w==&ch=JEGlhQrztjz08wqSIYI8Dg2Z8C8zXJfKjiLpY1kqakkUzLkcgJCZFQ==)

Here is where things currently stand:
* The Far Left opponent we defeated last year has already vowed for a rematch
* Nancy Pelosi has her sights on this district to flip in 2022
* The Democrats have already pledged to spend millions of dollars against Republicans like me

While these are certainly tough challenges that we will need to overcome, I have some good news too: **we beat the odds before, and I know we can do it again.**

If we want to make that happen, though, we need to have your support to make it happen. [**Friend, can you rush in an emergency donation to help us overcome these challenges and protect our values in CA-48?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Xoelzg2lsiF_A75e6zb1bX75BHakf1UHLNuTFKSuhvPrBGWJfPbfx5WIeejUuoroK9jf-wEhTzGiy4JGIyLmhYEbIs9uOt6q9-425ONS99GwHl-X47p3Mg1JCi2P2rXa2HPlXIPDqLrvJm86hSqWxoH-Tr6BQCAuV6KpuBnWtH4D4F-8KEDrF7gKxLUrqaPV6_Y7x4UmZwnTUxrMOH4X2hpPGC0Gncg-htfW8ISc8XFxR8PS6MhmVidY-a330fNJSbYcbv33crmhfUCWeGhBLHO9Opo48odYSWaCtSZCJvdNF1FU9vIx2lP4BRNMSyBQNZs04C1UQ2FGVqtg5HF-FMfldorZNXjMbZCGW_SuaMmR7xSUau0CoTaSYreK7imqUwHFjKeAYMuJuN5ETdgjFqpFeAtVFSFg8lJLYK8QJ6TE-MrKJRdT0dWENc3QWTO5&c=9w7eFZACzREU43fgf7nMmXbVENMLPLKKRD5ssxKWxO4ArbiQuAx96w==&ch=JEGlhQrztjz08wqSIYI8Dg2Z8C8zXJfKjiLpY1kqakkUzLkcgJCZFQ==)

It's going to be an uphill battle, but I know we can do it with your help.

Thank you,

Michelle Steel

With so much uncertainty right now, we know not everyone will be able to contribute. But even if you're unable to chip in right now, we could still use your help.

clean_body: The Democrats have pledged millions of dollars to take back this seat that we narrowly won last year. ** . == Dear Friend, I need your help. Our final fundraising day of the month is here, and we are now so close to reaching our fundraising goal for this month. Unfortunately, though, we are not there yet. The Democrats have pledged millions of dollars to take back this seat that we narrowly won last year. With only a 5-seat lead in the House of Representatives, I know that winning back the House is attainable. But, Democrats are committed to spending as much as they can from their warchest to make sure conservative voices are silenced in Congress. That's why it's so important for us to hit this goal and keep up with the Democrats. == | | == | | == | == | | == | == | | == Here is where things currently stand: The Far Left opponent we defeated last year has already vowed for a rematch Nancy Pelosi has her sights on this district to flip in 2022 The Democrats have already pledged to spend millions of dollars against Republicans like me While these are certainly tough challenges that we will need to overcome, I have some good news too: we beat the odds before, and I know we can do it again. If we want to make that happen, though, we need to have your support to make it happen. == It's going to be an uphill battle, but I know we can do it with your help. Thank you, Michelle Steel With so much uncertainty right now, we know not everyone will be able to contribute. But even if you're unable to chip in right now, we could still use your help. == Paid for by Michelle Steel for Congress P.O Box 472 Surfside, CA 90743== == == == == | | Michelle Steel for Congress | 8907 Warner Ave Suite 220, Huntington Beach, CA 92647 | | Sent by mailto:action@standupforliberty.net powered by

body:
Can I count on you to live up to your top supporter status and chip in anything you can before tonight's midnight deadline?

********
Patriot, it's dire...

I am personally reaching out because I was given a hand-picked list of the most dedicated supporters that we can count on for our CRITICAL deadline.

_**And you were at the top of our list.**_

body:
The February End of the Month deadline is in LESS THAN 6 HOURS and we are still critically behind on the goal we set to catch up to the Democrats.
[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001OI019kG_fi6VOelJFeLbvjdElz_ZZDvWJ7UZd9BlmUmXggXNOyx-MuotvLREoSjlJs2HSrtouazGjwFR8Rz39ThmErn-GqLsa6ar7yTiWjiWI72gcZmLMVt44XEBxIptnww36N_wpKMirgC4Vf5tST-_oLxxhskKzdYHpiqppckN-vCY8qQ5Nrl0ozcXnhlOW1D_PA1u7LsCRNwIx3szcX-XHyi7-9vRcJ2VXABhgf9RLIydX_MbGDA9Ma4lzMdMwnPJ0Cfkcmh9xhc0xv3yWFkfLpssnrar3pew3XdRgAW-hlQDt91gd0Hjb1eSJV9PDOURHlsawOcN4Ok8vUnaXcpL4YdRYGY9ggsxKb3rvRTyYadUDVst_YJnHhWu0CcGsl4z0NJScmLgzZK2OcBAhH0l9P-d1y26_nGB2TsoPKrfIEu_ALFjUs6OGkUpgd4huXybFrDyUSb7T_vCVVJ0WOYjTU7uOuo7&c=nqxC6MezvpTXZTiz6qB-pIYM_hkA0WgvpJjfrrISfzoK7w5cyrB_BQ==&ch=Omoanus1bMBOPVj2hiuwzCCmZEXl32lPvgpT3WYsuq30MF8-DK1-lA==) Friend, The February End of the Month deadline is in **LESS THAN 6 HOURS** and we are still critically behind on the goal we set to catch up to the Democrats. If we fail to meet this goal, Chuck Schumer and Nancy Pelosi will be well-positioned to grow their slim majorities in the House and Senate. This would mean the END of the pro-growth, pro- America agenda. **We are BEGGING our grassroots supporters to chip in so we can start our plans of reclaiming our majorities on the right foot. clean_body: Your support will make a huge difference today. == We now have less than 24 hours to meet our February fundraising goal, and we are still $2,000 short, Friend! == == Radical Democrats are trying to keep our country locked down, so they attacked Governor Reynolds when she fought to keep Iowa open and when she started safely and responsibly lifting COVID-19 restrictions. And they continue their attack every day. That's why we need your help to fight back! Now, Nancy Pelosi and Chuck Schumer want you to pay for states like New York and California that have remained locked down and suffered as a result. Why should Iowans have to pay for Governor Cuomo and Governor Newsom 's mistakes, who have mismanaged this COVID-19 crisis? The answer is: we shouldn't. == It's time we put Iowa FIRST! == == == == == == We don't have much time remaining to send a message to the Democrats that Iowans and Americans around the country reject their radical policies like Blue state bailouts! == == Thank you, Alerts via Team Reynolds Get involved with Team Reynolds Today! As a conservative political outsider spending my whole life in the private sector creating jobs, I know first-hand the radical Left's playbook of raising taxes to compensate for their reckless spending that ruins our economy and stifles small business.

It is a travesty of what is happening in Virginia and across the country. Left-wing politicians like Ralph Northam and Terry McAulliffe are doing everything they can to weaken America and destroy small businesses.

That stops with me, Friend. clean_body: This is really it. &zwnj == Friend, My team has reached out to you multiple times, but now it 's my turn. Virginia and America are at a critical crossroads, Friend. If we do not meet our February fundraising goal by 11:59 PM tonight, we risk losing Virginia -- and the rest of our country to the radical Left for good. This November is America's FIRST chance to tell the radical left we won't give-in to their extreme policies. == == | == As a conservative political outsider spending my whole life in the private sector creating jobs, I know first-hand the radical Left's playbook of raising taxes to compensate for their reckless spending that ruins our economy and stifles small business. It is a travesty of what is happening in Virginia and across the country. Left-wing politicians like Ralph Northam and Terry McAulliffe are doing everything they can to weaken America and destroy small businesses. That stops with me, Friend. I am ready to shake up the status quo and tackle the tough issues facing Virginia and the rest of America like putting our kids safely back in the classroom while standing up for conservative values and our American freedoms. == | == | == | == | == | == | == This is a critical opportunity for conservatives to signal to the radical left that their time is running out. == == http:// Thank you, Pete Snyder Get involved with Team Pete Today! Follow us on == and ==. == To receive text updates text PETE4VA to 47682. subject: I need a moment of your time

body:
I'm reaching out on behalf of my colleague, Cathy McMorris Rodgers
Friend,

I'm reaching out on behalf of my colleague, Cathy McMorris Rodgers, to ask for your help. She is up against a tight fundraising deadline and she is still behind on her goal for the month.

Despite all of our top critics' expectations, we've continued to fend off political attacks from Democrats in battleground districts.

**But the Democrats ' smear campaigns are targeting individual conservatives who are willing to speak out against their ultra-progressive policies, [so I need you to stand with Cathy while she continues to call out liberal Democrats in Congress who try and promote a socialist agenda for America.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001FGPvY71Wfa6qNeplDZrlZOEV7ExLMHF4sACzqpWOOIWG7X3thJTFIG35cAFxQhzh4qNNGlvYkLv8mrMIdNeGs_tTHgAmX6BOeWo5AxigpxEJCVvv1PKcYdvKrgCZ3ZHsJUSlSFJu4ZogTsP5gIscnknic-INNrfxKzjCIFXlkEc68V0lz1M8ZF-h5Gir9FBtqlqKe72xgBjYiC5x0pb9UAJJuq-ipSLGgwuOIl-Pe3FpKZuNzjv8Ld0SMukos11WNRvzE8H30lIc5FNRV9wNgGteaeJogJ4uL8-R1E9Tx2XtWsIqMCmoDpWZ3vKzdlqRX2MqsK5Cx9UsOicIY0MZ034B2vsg6K-7HiEL0Z9yLhm__k7OFeUqmrpV9DW8bZvIBDLJj_XbD5w0AVRPPZUmFxQj-Og1iUEZg_UxWqHFE68lvqfiwC3IsiNOOGITKhqoDLF_xUzsOAmvHzGnNC6hFGzsIO4sa6kYGMV4uctxtRo=&c=yeoqjomLArc5X_3uHeeEVX4Zk2HwBaxJbAu0DQvYjgIaiiQCB1fspA==&ch=UOdijUqmkTkwsqp7-jQq0tY9K1AC1UqSoLErMw2e_rIpT2CDyQon0Q==) **

She is up against a tight fundraising deadline and she is still behind on her goal for the month. Despite all of our top critics' expectations, we've continued to fend off political attacks from Democrats in battleground districts. But the Democrats ' smear campaigns are targeting individual conservatives who are willing to speak out against their ultra-progressive policies, == I am confident that Cathy can defend her seat from Nancy Pelosi's big-money interest groups with some help from grassroots supporters like yourself. == == == == == == Nancy Pelosi and her left wing caucus still control the House of Representatives, and if she gets her way, this nation will feel the effects of her disastrous policies for decades to come. name: Hendrell Remus
subject: raising the bar
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, CAROL V
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral]
Peter,
I am thrilled with the response we are seeing to this month’s end-of-month series. I know that 2022 feels like a long way away, but it is absolutely critical that we continue this early momentum. We have until midnight tonight to beat last month’s fundraising numbers, and I’m confident we will. We just need your help.
Defeating Bill Lee is our number one priority, and right now updating our website is the most effective way to enhance our digital mobilizing capacity. Whichever you choose to support, we are so grateful.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailws [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailws] https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemail [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemail]
We’re doing everything we can, working towards turning Tennessee blue, but we can’t do it without you. If you’d prefer to donate towards our traditional end-of-month goal, please click the donate button below.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral]
Thank you,
Hendrell Remus
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral]
Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral]
P.S. Please, only donate if you can afford to. The impacts of this pandemic are real, and we completely understand if times are tough right now.
PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, CAROL V. ABNEY, TREASURER NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. CONTRIBUTIONS OR GIFTS TO TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY ARE NOT TAX DEDUCTIBLE.
Tennessee Democratic Party
319 Plus Park Blvd
Nashville, TN 37217
United States

Can you pitch in $10 to help us meet our $17,000 goal to help elect Democrats statewide in 2022?** | ****[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/25615595/274418038/-1381118426?refcode=EM_FR_B1_022821_6M&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MWFjNzgxZi1kOTc5LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=88Y8tSjUtZf-5CNFW5iq-5MZ9aHTPXf1x74oYsr_E_0=)****

**This team has powered our progress in North Carolina for years.**
In 2016, grassroots supporters like you helped Roy cross the finish line, electing him governor. In 2018, you fueled our movement to break the Republican supermajority in the state legislature. And in 2020, you rolled up your sleeves and put in the work to re-elect Roy, ensuring his strong leadership keeps our state moving forward.
**We couldn’t have done it without you.**
But we still have work to do. National Republicans are ready to do whatever it takes to regain control of Congress and rollback progress — we can stop them by helping protect and build on our Democratic majorities in the House and Senate.
**We must start laying the groundwork to elect North Carolina Democrats up and down the ballot _now_. If you can afford it, pitch in $10 before midnight to turn our state blue in 2022 and help our state and country continue on the path to progress.**

And in 2020, you rolled up your sleeves and put in the work to re-elect Roy, ensuring his strong leadership keeps our state moving forward. We couldn’t have done it without you. But we still have work to do. National Republicans are ready to do whatever it takes to regain control of Congress and rollback progress — we can stop them by helping protect and build on our Democratic majorities in the House and Senate. We must start laying the groundwork to elect North Carolina Democrats up and down the ballot now. If you can afford it, pitch in $10 before midnight to turn our state blue in 2022 and help our state and country continue on the path to progress. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = **** | = = | = = Thanks for your support, Team Cooper = Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States mailto:info@roycooper.com | Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign. By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

body:
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv]

Friend,

Y’all have really shown up this month. I know we’ve put out some pretty direct asks, but it’s a necessity if we are going to continue to grow as a state party. As Stacey Abrams recently stated in a New York Times opinion piece, “It may take 10 years. Do it anyway.”
Even if turning West Virginia blue feels like a long shot, remember that we are in this for the long game. Everything we are doing is working towards a blue future, no matter how long and hard the road is. That’s why your continued support means the world to us.
Can you donate $1 dollar today, and see if we can raise the additional $17 dollars we need to meet our goal? I know $17 dollars doesn’t sound like much, but we really want to get there by midnight tonight. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv]

name: Gaetz Research Team
subject: FLASH POLL: Should we fire Fauci?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Qaq88jYJy31Euf2TLtJh4aDA_ErM5lO0_mNEnJYjUq1JEM7CImzx9lQ5EpRnwn5ieI7PfuNT3w3pBYWtYfFmaXJwG1Il9dirkQMZvNr-y6gumLmjWpgETPAXM9wb2oD5xClhCaOjezBi9aDzfCykUKt9F3Cvty5kzbc88XVFilHZEQxaHawldg==&c=CroKam5gia9oo-hy2AX3L_FaO4mMIIKKIHiDxFxFcICVLXIE52J5ug==&ch=DVYqm2p7GTg7XhSfk3LtH7_lAZQuI3bnbwlxqqdkZcBivPv3FkIgQw==)
---
| Peter,
FLASH POLL: Do you think Dr. Anthony Fauci should still have a job after a completely botched handling of COVID-19, and his constantly changing directives and recommendations that aren't based on science?
---
| | | [YES - FIRE FAUCI](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Qaq88jYJy31Euf2TLtJh4aDA_ErM5lO0_mNEnJYjUq1JEM7CImzx9lQ5EpRnwn5iOgYeDMZPLywFriD-2qjJ00JXIHRJw1Lsrrs62mL01JrO1Sin7aZyMy6pK1xTi71ir98ywO8kvjpfzWtyqP6mKfa8VYAkHAn2qGfOjrU9QirdYgQIXUrY8g==&c=CroKam5gia9oo-hy2AX3L_FaO4mMIIKKIHiDxFxFcICVLXIE52J5ug==&ch=DVYqm2p7GTg7XhSfk3LtH7_lAZQuI3bnbwlxqqdkZcBivPv3FkIgQw==)
---
| | | [NO - FAUCI SHOULD STAY](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Qaq88jYJy31Euf2TLtJh4aDA_ErM5lO0_mNEnJYjUq1JEM7CImzx9lQ5EpRnwn5iOgYeDMZPLywFriD-2qjJ00JXIHRJw1Lsrrs62mL01JrO1Sin7aZyMy6pK1xTi71ir98ywO8kvjpfzWtyqP6mKfa8VYAkHAn2qGfOjrU9QirdYgQIXUrY8g==&c=CroKam5gia9oo-hy2AX3L_FaO4mMIIKKIHiDxFxFcICVLXIE52J5ug==&ch=DVYqm2p7GTg7XhSfk3LtH7_lAZQuI3bnbwlxqqdkZcBivPv3FkIgQw==)
---
| Dr. Fauci, [the highest-paid employee in the Federal Government](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Qaq88jYJy31Euf2TLtJh4aDA_ErM5lO0_mNEnJYjUq1JEM7CImzx9lQ5EpRnwn5ieI7PfuNT3w3pBYWtYfFmaXJwG1Il9dirkQMZvNr-y6gumLmjWpgETPAXM9wb2oD5xClhCaOjezBi9aDzfCykUKt9F3Cvty5kzbc88XVFilHZEQxaHawldg==&c=CroKam5gia9oo-hy2AX3L_FaO4mMIIKKIHiDxFxFcICVLXIE52J5ug==&ch=DVYqm2p7GTg7XhSfk3LtH7_lAZQuI3bnbwlxqqdkZcBivPv3FkIgQw==), has politicized COVID-19 and moved the goalposts to keep himself in power. He recently said that we may be wearing masks into 2022, cautioned against dining at restaurants even after we've been vaccinated, and refuses to say when we can return to normal.
He blames America for being one of the worst countries to deal with the virus, YET HE HAS BEEN THE ONE IN CHARGE.
We believe Dr. Fauci to be the epitome of the Swamp - entirely out of touch with real Americans and immune to consequences as long as he follows the narrative and the politics of the mainstream media. [No one has held him accountable, so it's time we do.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Qaq88jYJy31Euf2TLtJh4aDA_ErM5lO0_mNEnJYjUq1JEM7CImzx9lQ5EpRnwn5ieI7PfuNT3w3pBYWtYfFmaXJwG1Il9dirkQMZvNr-y6gumLmjWpgETPAXM9wb2oD5xClhCaOjezBi9aDzfCykUKt9F3Cvty5kzbc88XVFilHZEQxaHawldg==&c=CroKam5gia9oo-hy2AX3L_FaO4mMIIKKIHiDxFxFcICVLXIE52J5ug==&ch=DVYqm2p7GTg7XhSfk3LtH7_lAZQuI3bnbwlxqqdkZcBivPv3FkIgQw==)
If you can, chip in a small donation to Matt's campaign so that we can expose Dr. Fauci and other bureaucrats lurking in the Swamp for who they really are.
---
| | | [DONATE TODAY](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Qaq88jYJy31Euf2TLtJh4aDA_ErM5lO0_mNEnJYjUq1JEM7CImzx9lQ5EpRnwn5ieI7PfuNT3w3pBYWtYfFmaXJwG1Il9dirkQMZvNr-y6gumLmjWpgETPAXM9wb2oD5xClhCaOjezBi9aDzfCykUKt9F3Cvty5kzbc88XVFilHZEQxaHawldg==&c=CroKam5gia9oo-hy2AX3L_FaO4mMIIKKIHiDxFxFcICVLXIE52J5ug==&ch=DVYqm2p7GTg7XhSfk3LtH7_lAZQuI3bnbwlxqqdkZcBivPv3FkIgQw==)
---
| | | [FIRE FAUCI](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Qaq88jYJy31Euf2TLtJh4aDA_ErM5lO0_mNEnJYjUq1JEM7CImzx9lQ5EpRnwn5ieI7PfuNT3w3pBYWtYfFmaXJwG1Il9dirkQMZvNr-y6gumLmjWpgETPAXM9wb2oD5xClhCaOjezBi9aDzfCykUKt9F3Cvty5kzbc88XVFilHZEQxaHawldg==&c=CroKam5gia9oo-hy2AX3L_FaO4mMIIKKIHiDxFxFcICVLXIE52J5ug==&ch=DVYqm2p7GTg7XhSfk3LtH7_lAZQuI3bnbwlxqqdkZcBivPv3FkIgQw==)
---
| Thanks for your input,
Gaetz Research Team

name: Moms in Office
subject: We're so close
body:
secure.actblue.com/donate/momsinoffice?refcode=email [secure.actblue.com/donate/momsinoffice?refcode=email]We're so close to our goal
Hi Peter,
We love the fact that our biggest single expense in 2020 was direct support to candidates! As we build our training program and work to support allies with the same policy goals, we still need your help - there are no off years! We are just $726 away from our February fundraising goal. If we fall short, we won't be able to endorse as many candidates who are working to support all families.
$25 lets us host a candidate training session [secure.actblue.com/donate/moms4texas?refcode=0226]
$15 pays for postage for our monthly thank you notes [secure.actblue.com/donate/momsinoffice?refcode=0228b]
While we're doing the work to recruit and prepare candidates, we still need your help. We're not a PAC funded by big dollar donors - we're a grassroots group because we know that our collective power is stronger when we work together.
As moms, we know that every dollar in our budget is important. We value every contribution, whether it's for $5 or $500. [secure.actblue.com/donate/momsinoffice?refcode=0228c]
If finances are tight right now, as they are for so many, we understand. We won't stop fighting for representation that will work to uplift every family.
Thanks for all you do,
Simona Grace
Donate [secure.actblue.com/donate/moms4texas?refcode=0228d]
Moms in Office
13351 Riverside Drive
#265
Sherman Oaks, CA 91423
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.everyaction.com/unsubscribeUnique/2be5c0a4-4e78-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992/3dd4798f-f779-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNkZDQ3OThmLWY3NzktZWIxMS04NWFhLTAwMTU1ZDQzYzk5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=dC8EisnvcOC24azAKvQSlPFnu-84rVFqWF8nTqJ93rE=&id=103678513 .

[secure.actblue.com/donate/momsinoffice?refcode=0228c] If finances are tight right now, as they are for so many, we understand. We won't stop fighting for representation that will work to uplift every family. Thanks for all you do, Simona Grace Donate [secure.actblue.com/donate/moms4texas?refcode=0228d] Moms in Office 13351 Riverside Drive #265 Sherman Oaks, CA 91423 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: Weekend Recap: One Year of COVID-19, Two New Mass Vaccination Sites, Three Changes to Sports Rules
body:
Your RI COVID-19 News Update
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
As February comes to a close here in Rhode Island, I want to make sure you've got the latest info on our COVID-19 response.
Make sure that you're signed up for the Rhode Island Department of Health's [weekly vaccine distribution updates](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001J2SOKY4E5J_S_eHqDHhBjT9Tu_ftLBkScpVd6OrEaCcbA6omx3C12GgkeSv54MkqSeWIgIa6BQsbxSzPuciSHnM1MgGIlsg5m2t711mVpsGEgIBESCTn57aL63cc6ovkyp8yPpZLuDwaivfsc5H0YwXqlmkJV5DmmNJigLo242fWbAlclmaltCzmLlXoE_P9-FwCSjWRjw1P8E3hdewPdP3V3pZzEjcHZBjjjosmQKAwLsNLBYUhFQ==&c=SzzbLtVl9hgJh9B6T2jW77R7VynNm6qqHBL1btjK7TSigFqMabadpg==&ch=HjAbGL2jVpZBaMhqpKP4x0ol4IxoceAMhk6UR13oo5sRmcOIbRLSNQ==) as well as the Vaccine Notification Interest List on [portal.ri.gov](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001J2SOKY4E5J_S_eHqDHhBjT9Tu_ftLBkScpVd6OrEaCcbA6omx3C12MCmGATiEmKIvcIiDAT0tqmpxKCOR5nOTkevuMuk9U3PHh_SRnvG0J_mxpikQkJtIdyKSFAW-iaZ1iQKJWdChC4=&c=SzzbLtVl9hgJh9B6T2jW77R7VynNm6qqHBL1btjK7TSigFqMabadpg==&ch=HjAbGL2jVpZBaMhqpKP4x0ol4IxoceAMhk6UR13oo5sRmcOIbRLSNQ==) to stay up-to-date on when you're eligible for vaccination.
---
| | |
---|---
|
ONE YEAR OF COVID-19

Tomorrow marks the one year anniversary of the first case of COVID-19 in Rhode Island. It's been a long, difficult year, filled with tragedy, heartbreak, and loss. But in our darkest days, we came together and we lifted one another up. We did what Rhode Islanders always do: we found hope.

Our data is continuing to trend in the right direction -- our case positivity rate is around 2%, hospitalizations are plummeting, and we have administered over 250,000 vaccines. Let's keep going. You can get more information on how to get vaccinated, or how to sign up to get an alert when you become eligible, by clicking [this link.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001J2SOKY4E5J_S_eHqDHhBjT9Tu_ftLBkScpVd6OrEaCcbA6omx3C12ILYZOc3LzhFk8Dp-1cIwQVF3NsR6FDMpG8X6B1y8VvmiT0wjVlNnHdx6GowG8t4aAuabasxyQ6VxSY8Ausz-XxX77T1GvQbNy_dtIwnZtm7Z5pWXWTsCu-TeJevGNTd_8KA52TTIeTxkDEyvyc6Ms8eLFbJvILB-g==&c=SzzbLtVl9hgJh9B6T2jW77R7VynNm6qqHBL1btjK7TSigFqMabadpg==&ch=HjAbGL2jVpZBaMhqpKP4x0ol4IxoceAMhk6UR13oo5sRmcOIbRLSNQ==)
| | |
---|---
|
TWO NEW MASS VACCINATION SITES

In the coming weeks, we are planning to open two new State-run vaccination sites: one in Middletown, and one in Woonsocket. The Middletown site will be located where the Benny's used to be, and the Woonsocket site will be located at the corner of Mendon Road and Diamond Hill Road, where the Sears department store was previously.

People will be able to register for appointments at these two sites the way that they can currently register for the Dunk and Sockanosset: either by going to [www.VaccinateRI.org](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001J2SOKY4E5J_S_eHqDHhBjT9Tu_ftLBkScpVd6OrEaCcbA6omx3C12ISKcLXoD9dYh5FvuLUw_SbajGFFsATBbTTZuqDMaMzO6Kbcamu3N2gPYwresEAST8yrOWWrpaMjF87sAYM_ZJ4XqF2adxs4HA==&c=SzzbLtVl9hgJh9B6T2jW77R7VynNm6qqHBL1btjK7TSigFqMabadpg==&ch=HjAbGL2jVpZBaMhqpKP4x0ol4IxoceAMhk6UR13oo5sRmcOIbRLSNQ==) or by calling 844-930-1779.

We also want to reassure Rhode Islanders of all ages that our currently-open vaccination sites are physically accessible for people with mobility issues, and staff are in place at both sites to provide additional assistance. For Rhode Islanders who cannot leave their homes, we ask that they or their caregivers fill out the form at [covid.ri.gov/vaccination](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001J2SOKY4E5J_S_eHqDHhBjT9Tu_ftLBkScpVd6OrEaCcbA6omx3C12KbQbXZQmbxyL4PHSeN_yHxvbx3VU4SrbbEDwSV0fQYI05QFjutOSj4tkamAqLt31h6bYtsTICCryZVyRWgaLOaCHP0IrNvCHigXgdbeKmTC&c=SzzbLtVl9hgJh9B6T2jW77R7VynNm6qqHBL1btjK7TSigFqMabadpg==&ch=HjAbGL2jVpZBaMhqpKP4x0ol4IxoceAMhk6UR13oo5sRmcOIbRLSNQ==) to help us ensure they can get vaccinated. (Please note that this form is not a vaccination sign-up form.)
| | |
---|---
|
THREE CHANGES TO SPORTS RULES

Because of the strength of our current case numbers, we are making three immediate changes to the restrictions on youth sports that we put in place last fall:

1) Outdoor team sports such as football and lacrosse will be able to hold games and competitions this spring. These sports are being played with COVID modifications such as mask-wearing and social distancing on the sidelines to reduce risk.

2) Rhode Island teams can now play out-of-state teams from states with less than 5% positivity rates, where travel is not restricted, for all moderate-risk and lower-risk sports in Rhode Island, as well as for higher-risk sports played outdoors.

3) Spectators may watch events if the facility or host can maintain occupancy at no more than 1 person per 125 square feet, or at 40% capacity. For youth sports, spectators should only be family members. For colleges and universities, the schools may only allow students and personnel who are part of the home school campus. Again, other COVID protocols around mask-wearing and distancing remain in place.
| -Gina Raimondo Governor
---
| | Governor's Office | 82 Smith Street, Providence, RI 02903
---

name: Mondaire Jones
subject: Let me explain why a contribution -- of any amount -- will make a huge difference for our movement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_
body:
Your financial support allows me to focus on the work that matters.
#

**I’m reaching out today to ask you to make a contribution to my campaign, if your circumstances allow, before the end of February. My team has set a goal to raise $15,000 before tonight at midnight.**
Let me explain why a contribution — of any amount — will make a huge difference for our movement (but if you’re ready to give, you can use this link: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-em-february-2021](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/25628068/274462805/-1863554673?refcode2=0ba385d3-057a-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&refcode=em210228-2-rem&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYmEzODVkMy0wNTdhLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QcBuxjWAcX6gJ_7t3PxiZiDfpD3knkRSmKCRW8HuFoM=)**).
It is the honor of a lifetime to serve New York’s 17th Congressional District, the community that raised me from humble beginnings and catapulted me to the halls of Congress (which I admit I’m still learning how to navigate — because the tunnels are hard!).
The two months I’ve been in Congress have been instructive in many ways.
Something I’ve found troubling — though not surprising — is how few working-class folks are able to serve in Congress. For too many of my colleagues, the debate regarding raising the minimum wage to $15/hour is purely academic.
By contrast, policies like this are personal to me. I grew up in Section 8 housing, raised by a single mom who had to work multiple jobs. We need more people in Congress who understand the struggles facing working people because they have lived them.
I’m fighting hard to get legislation passed that working families need, like real COVID relief for working families, a $15 minimum wage, student debt forgiveness, Medicare for All, and a Green New Deal. Your financial support allows me to continue to fight for these policies — not worry about fundraising for re-election ahead of redistricting next year.
**[If you can, please make a donation today to help us hit our $15,000 goal so that I can remain focused on championing progressive priorities during these difficult months ahead.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/25628069/274462806/-1863554673?refcode2=0ba385d3-057a-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&refcode=em210228-2-rem&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYmEzODVkMy0wNTdhLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QcBuxjWAcX6gJ_7t3PxiZiDfpD3knkRSmKCRW8HuFoM=)**
Thank you for your continued support. I remain optimistic that this Congress will deliver real relief for the American people if we continue to apply pressure. We will build the future we deserve, but we must keep up the fight.
Onward,
Mondaire
**[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/25628070/274462807/-1863554673?refcode2=0ba385d3-057a-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&refcode=em210228-2-rem&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYmEzODVkMy0wNTdhLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QcBuxjWAcX6gJ_7t3PxiZiDfpD3knkRSmKCRW8HuFoM=)**

name: Nicole Malliotakis
subject: Fwd: I Still Can't Believe It
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NICOLE FOR NEW YORK
body:
Friend, I wanted to make sure you saw my earlier note. Sorry to email you twice in one day, but there’s only a few hours left and we're only about $830 short of this month’s fundraising goal.
| | | | Friend,

I wanted to make sure you saw my earlier note.

---

Derek,

**[We only have a few hours left until the deadline for Mark's priorities survey. Will you tell Mark what you want him to prioritize in Congress this year?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d8d0/53d9897e/55200249/1c88df1e/805094396/VEsF/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/s/warner-febeom-2021prioritiessurvey")**

With a new president and a new Congress, Mark Warner believes we now have an opportunity to create real, positive change for Americans and move the country forward after the chaos and divisiveness of the past four years.

From passing a new COVID-19 relief bill to strengthening health care to finally closing the gender wage gap, Mark is ready to do what you sent him to Washington to do: _make progress for Virginians_.

So he's interested in hearing what _your priorities_ are for him in 2021.

**[What do you want him to focus on in the 117th Congress?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d8d0/53d9897e/55200249/1c88df1e/805094396/VEsC/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/s/warner-febeom-2021prioritiessurvey")**

Thank you for your time!

-- Team Warner

body:
February is almost in the books, and we’re up against a deadline. Will you help? | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/thankful-470278?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| | [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=7aac98aa49&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
id:2020-04-23-15:43:59:705t
---
| Hoosier Republican,

There are only hours left until our February End-of-Month fundraising deadline hits, so I’ll keep this short.

My team has emailed you over the last week about how important action is now to ensure future successes, and I wanted to reach out to put an exclamation mark on their comments.

Across the country, the Democrats are vigorously pushing a far-left agenda, empowered by holding both chambers of the legislature and the White House. They are threatening to turn our country upside down, and force a socialist agenda on all of us.

The only way to stop them is by ramping up our grassroots efforts. We can’t let the coastal elites change our way of life and tear down everything Vice President Pence and President Trump worked so hard to build over the last four years.

[_**Please, chip in now to help us close out February strong, and set ourselves up to take back the House and Senate in 2022**_](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=0c30a74974&e=1acd9bb3d6).

Thanks for your support,

Kyle Hupfer
Chairman, Indiana GOP

Thanks for your support, Kyle Hupfer Chairman, Indiana GOP | "CHIP IN NOW >>" id:2021-02-08-14:57:49:465t | | id:2020-04-28-19:45:12:543t | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2021 Indiana Republican State Committee, Inc., All rights reserved.

[Team Morrisey is building momentum and gaining strength to fight one-party rule in D.C. which is passing disastrous bills right and left. Republican attorneys general have a unique means to fight the far-left Congress and President Biden. We are seeking to raise an additional $3,100 to help meet our End of Month Goal. Generous allies will match donations for today only. Support Team Morrisey today with $35, $50, or even $100 to help us crush our goal!](https://patrickmorrisey.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c58654388ec83b4612750ef7&id=00000cfc13&e=24057c0240)
|
---
Dear Peter:One-party Democratic rule in D.C. is already an unmitigated disaster.The House Democrats just passed a massive stimulus bill filled with pork. For example, there’s **$40 MILLION extra for a subway in SPEAKER PELOSI’S district. MAJORITY LEADER SCHUMER delivers $5.6 BILLION to New York City for a BAILOUT SLUSH FUND to pay for financial mismanagement.** Meanwhile, a small percentage of dollars are actually spent on Covid-public health matters.**Outrageous!** Right now, there is only **ONE WAY to FIGHT BACK.** The far-left controls the House and the Senate, making it very hard for Republicans in Congress to win any big fight.**You know who can win?** Republican attorneys general and West Virginia Attorney General Patrick Morrisey.**We’re outside the D.C. power structure and have the ability to go to Court to stop some of President Biden’s and Speaker Pelosi’s top initiatives.** We’ll win the same way Morrisey stopped Obama’s so-called Clean Power Plan: **by BUILDING MASSIVE LEGAL AND GRASSROOTS COALITIONS to advance conservative values.** Help us get STRONGER TODAY and meet our End of Month Goals!**We’re $3,100 short and MUST MAKE PROGRESS this weekend.** Some of our allies will match donations that go toward fighting against one-party rule.
[](https://patrickmorrisey.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c58654388ec83b4612750ef7&id=c9b97716d5&e=24057c0240)
Donate $35, $50, or even $100 today. We need your help to educate people about these nasty pork projects coming from the D.C. special interests.

body:
| | | |
---
| | |
### Christie55 In The News
---
| [ ](https://christie55.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c62c4d5c98958cc280ee81bb&id=d1edb72653&e=65ae29fa7e)
---
**Yahoo News**

**"The science is on our side"**
Chris Christie blasts Biden and Democrats over failure to reopen schools

In a recent interview with Yahoo News, Christie said school closures are an issue that “resonates with parents,” particularly those in suburbs where Democrats have recently been making inroads. Those are the very suburbs — in Virginia, New Jersey, California — where the battle over school closures has been most fervently pitched.

“When you look at the voters that Trump lost in the last election, it was predominantly suburban, educated voters. And they’re reacting very poorly to all this stuff,” Christie said.
_[Continue Reading](https://christie55.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c62c4d5c98958cc280ee81bb&id=c7cc90b4c9&e=65ae29fa7e)_
| [ ](https://christie55.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c62c4d5c98958cc280ee81bb&id=d89e9c2464&e=65ae29fa7e)
---
**Wall Street Journal**

**Follow the Science, Not the Teachers Unions**
Biden’s CDC changes its tune for obvious political reasons.
By: Chris Christie

The CDC researchers looked at more than 90,000 students in 11 North Carolina districts and found that only 32 students and staff members were infected in school. In the same period, 773 got infected outside school.

On Jan. 26 the science was made clear: Schools can reopen with appropriate safeguards. Then the teachers unions got involved and the CDC changed its tune.
_[Continue Reading](https://christie55.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c62c4d5c98958cc280ee81bb&id=cbf50aef38&e=65ae29fa7e)_
|

| | [ ](https://christie55.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c62c4d5c98958cc280ee81bb&id=08b5f0023b&e=65ae29fa7e)

**Chris Christie discusses his Wall Street Journal Op-Ed**

**The Hugh Hewitt Show**

**Chris Christie discusses Rush Limbaugh's Legacy on the Conservative Movement**
_[Listen Here](https://christie55.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c62c4d5c98958cc280ee81bb&id=7a9ad5cb4a&e=65ae29fa7e)_

---
**Brian Kilmeade Show**

**Chris Christie: The GOP Can’t Be A Party Of One Person It Has To Be A Party Of Ideas**

Governor Chris Christie joins the Brian Kilmeade show to discuss the future of the GOP following the 2020 election.

_[Listen Here](https://christie55.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c62c4d5c98958cc280ee81bb&id=3cbc2618d8&e=65ae29fa7e)_

---
**Guy Benson Show**

**Chris Christie joins the Guy Benson Show**

Governor Chris Christie joined the Guy Benson Show to discuss the latest in the President's 2nd impeachment trial, the Super Bowl, and Bruce Springsteen.

_[Listen Here](https://christie55.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c62c4d5c98958cc280ee81bb&id=7004271dfe&e=65ae29fa7e)_

---
**Steve Adubato**

**Chris Christie Discusses the Capitol Riots & How He Differs from Trump with Steve Adubato**

Steve Adubato is joined by Former New Jersey Governor, Chris Christie (R), to talk about the United States Capitol riots on January 6, 2021, President Trump’s involvement in inciting the riots, and the biggest challenges and opportunities Joe Biden will face in his presidency. They also discuss the lessons Governor Christie learned from his personal experience with COVID-19 and the challenges facing vaccine distribution in New Jersey. Jan. 26 the science was made clear: Schools can reopen with appropriate safeguards. Then the teachers unions got involved and the CDC changed its tune.

Donald Trump just teased another Presidential run. Here’s how we can help stop him. Right now, Virginia Republicans in the 2021 Governor’s race are tripping over themselves to suck up to Donald Trump. So far, self-proclaimed “Trump in heels” Amanda Chase is the runaway winner -- she has big leads in three straight polls and the AP is now calling her a “serious contender.” If we do our part and defeat Amanda Chase, we can send the message that Donald Trump’s hateful, anti-democratic politics have no home in our commonwealth.
